scripts.db:migrate:remote:private: wrangler --config wrangler.private.jsonc d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.deploy: vite build && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:private: vite build && wrangler --config wrangler.private.jsonc d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler --config wrangler.private.jsonc deploy

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Generate a long random secret, for example with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

SETUP_TOKEN.description: Set a one-time bootstrap token for first-run admin creation. Use a long random value such as `openssl rand -hex 32`.

DB.description: Primary D1 database for receipts and Better Auth tables. A fresh database is provisioned during Deploy to Cloudflare setup.
